sources.title: Gaslight
sources.description: Title: Gaslight Summary: Years after her aunt was murdered in her home, a young woman moves back into the house with her new husband. However, he has a secret that he will do anything to protect, even if it means driving his wife insane. Directed by: George Cukor Actors: Charles Boyer, Ingrid Bergman, Joseph Cotten Production Company: Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer (MGM) Release Date: 30 October 1944 (Sweden) Aspect Ratio: 1.37 : 1 After the death of her famous opera-singing aunt, Paula is sent to study in Italy to become a great opera singer as well. While there, she falls in love with the charming Gregory Anton. The two return to London, and Paula begins to notice strange goings-on: missing pictures, strange footsteps in the night and gaslights that dim without being touched. As she fights to retain her sanity, her new husband's intentions come into question.

sources.title: Gaslight (restored, colorized) (1940, mystery, imdb score: 7.4)
sources.description: Plot: Twenty years after the murder of Alice Barlow, her house is finally occupied again.

sources.title: Gaslight (restored) (1940, mystery, imdb score: 7.4)
sources.description: Plot: Twenty years after the murder of Alice Barlow, her house is finally occupied again.

sources.title: LA LUZ QUE AGONIZA - (1944) VOSE
sources.description: Título original: Gaslight Estrenos: En los Estados Unidos, el 4 de mayo de 1944 en Nueva York. En México se estrenó el 25 de diciembre de 1944 en el enorme cine Metropólitan del D.F. (3,627 localidades), donde se mantuvo en cartelera por ocho semanas. Duración: 114 min. País de origen: Los Estados Unidos de Norteamérica Dirección: George Cukor Guion: John Van Druten, Walter Reisch, John L. Balderston. Obra: Patrick Hamilton Fotografía: Joseph Ruttenberg (B&W) Música: Bronislau Kaper Reparto: Charles Boyer, Ingrid Bergman, Joseph Cotten, Dame May Whitty, Angela Lansbury, Barbara Everest, Emil Rameau, Edmund Breon, Halliwell Hobbes, Tom Stevenson, Heather Thatcher Género: Drama, Intriga, Film Noir, Drama psicológico, Siglo XIX, Remake, Sinopsis En la Inglaterra victoriana, una famosa cantante de ópera es asesinada. Su joven sobrina, que vivía con ella, es enviada a Italia, y el caso queda sin resolver. Allí estudia canto y se casa con el pianista acompañante de su profesor. Tras la luna de miel, la pareja se establece en la antigua casa de la cantante asesinada, donde la joven comienza a oír extraños e inexplicables ruidos mientras la luz de gas baja de intensidad. ( FILMAFFINITY )

metadata.Plot: After the death of her famous opera-singing aunt, Paula Alquist (Ingrid Bergman) is sent to study in Italy to become a great opera singer as well. While there, she falls in love with the charming Gregory Anton (Charles Boyer). The two return to London, and Paula begins to notice strange goings-on: missing pictures, strange footsteps in the night, and gaslights that dim without being touched. As she fights to retain her sanity, her new husband's intentions come into question.
metadata.Writer: John Van Druten, Walter Reisch, John L. Balderston
metadata.Actors: Charles Boyer, Ingrid Bergman, Joseph Cotten
